common.discardChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to discard them?

metadata.title: Capo
metadata.description: A modern song library app for musicians featuring chords and lyrics, built with Next.js and ChordPro format.

songs.title: Songs
songs.selectSongDescription: Choose a song from the list to view details, edit, or add to a playlist
songs.clickKeyBadgeInstruction: Click on the key badge to select songs for a playlist
songs.deleteSongConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{title}". This action cannot be undone.
songs.deleteSongDescription: Permanently delete this song. This action cannot be undone.
songs.addLyricsDescription: Add lyrics to your song using ChordPro format
songs.enterSongDetails: Enter the basic song information. You can add lyrics in the next step.
songs.songSettingsInfo: Settings like capo and transpose will be available after the song is created.
songs.lyricsFormatInfo: Enter lyrics in ChordPro format. Chords are displayed inline with the lyrics.
songs.noLyrics: This song does not have lyrics yet.
songs.lyricsAvailable: Lyrics are available for this song.

lyrics.displaySettingsDescription: Adjust font size, transpose, and capo

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.selectPlaylistDescription: Choose a playlist from the list to view songs and manage it

playlistDetail.anyoneWithLink: Anyone with the link can view
playlistDetail.deletePlaylistConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}". This action cannot be undone.
playlistDetail.deletePlaylistDescription: Permanently delete this playlist. This action cannot be undone.
playlistDetail.noSongsToAdd: All your songs are already in this playlist
playlistDetail.guestEditingDisabledHint: Only available when playlist is public

toasts.songsAlreadyInPlaylist: All songs are already in this playlist

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Here's an overview of your library.

playlistShare.editSongsHint: Guest editing from shared links is coming soon.
playlistShare.notFoundDescription: This playlist doesn't exist, was deleted, or was made private.
playlistShare.notFoundSubtext: The link may have expired or the owner changed their sharing settings.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to start creating and sharing your music

account.title: Account
account.info: Authentication is managed through Google. Your name and email cannot be changed here.
account.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
account.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all your songs, playlists, and data. This action cannot be undone.

teams.title: Teams
teams.createNewTeamDescription: Set up a new team to collaborate with others
teams.teamNameDescription: Choose a name for your team
teams.clickIconToChange: . Click the icon to change it.
teams.publicTeamDescription: Allow others to discover and request to join this team
teams.cancelInvitationConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation for {email}?
teams.cancelInvitationWarning: They will need a new invite to join the team.
teams.leaveTeamConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave "{name}"? You will lose access to all team content.
teams.leaveTeamWarning: This action cannot be undone. You will need to be invited again to rejoin the team.
teams.deleteTeamDescription: Once you delete a team, there is no going back. Please be certain.
teams.deleteTeamConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
teams.transferOwnershipDescription: Transfer ownership to another member before leaving
teams.transferOwnershipStayDescription: Transfer ownership to another member and stay as admin
teams.leaveAsOwner: As the owner, you must transfer ownership to another member before leaving.
teams.noOtherMembers: You are the only member. Leaving will delete this team.
teams.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the team?
teams.removeMemberWarning: This action cannot be undone. They will need to be invited again to rejoin.

invitations.title: Team Invitation
invitations.pendingDescription: Review and accept team invitations sent to you.
invitations.emptyDescription: You don't have any pending team invitations at the moment.
invitations.invalidLinkDescription: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.
invitations.signInRequiredDescription: You need to be signed in with the email address that matches this invitation.
invitations.errorExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask the team admin to send you a new invitation.
invitations.errorAlreadyAccepted: This invitation was already accepted. You can access the team from your Teams page.
invitations.errorNotFound: This invitation link is invalid or no longer available.

chords.title: Chord: {chordName}
chords.noDiagram: No diagram available for this chord.

activity.noActivityDescription: Your recent actions will appear here

hero.description: Manage your complete song catalog with chords and lyrics. Build setlists, collaborate with your band, and share with the world — all in one place.

features.sectionDescription: From the first rehearsal to the last encore, Capo has you covered.

songLibrary.title: Song Library
songLibrary.description: Keep your entire catalog in one place. Filter by key, BPM, or status. Find the right song in seconds.

chordproEditor.title: ChordPro Editor
chordproEditor.description: Write and edit songs in ChordPro format with a live-preview split-pane editor and syntax highlighting.

smartSetlists.title: Smart Setlists
smartSetlists.description: Build playlists for rehearsals and gigs. Drag and drop to reorder. Export and share in seconds.

teamCollab.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollab.description: Invite your bandmates to a shared library. Everyone stays in sync with the same songs and setlists.

instantSharing.title: Instant Sharing
instantSharing.description: Share any playlist via a unique link — no account needed. Perfect for session players and venue staff.

chordDiagrams.title: Chord Diagrams
chordDiagrams.description: Tap any chord to see a fingering diagram. Color-coded by section: verse, chorus, bridge, and more.

songLibrarySection.description: Import and organize all your songs with rich metadata — key, BPM, tags, and status. Powerful filters help you find the right song in seconds, even with hundreds in your library.
songLibrarySection.feature1: Filter by key, BPM, and status
songLibrarySection.feature2: Custom tags for any genre or mood

teamsSection.description: Invite bandmates to a shared library. Everyone works from the same songs and setlists, so nobody shows up to rehearsal with outdated charts.
teamsSection.feature1: Shared song libraries across the team
teamsSection.feature3: Switch between personal and team context

sharingSection.description: Generate a unique link for any playlist and share it with session players, sound engineers, or the venue. They can view songs and lyrics without creating an account.
sharingSection.feature1: Unique share code for every playlist
sharingSection.feature3: Full song lyrics and chords visible

cta.headline: Ready to play?
cta.description: Join musicians who use Capo to stay organized, rehearse smarter, and perform with confidence.
cta.signInMethod: Sign in with Google · No credit card required
